title: Battle Vocabulary
objective: Learn essential weapons and combat terms of the Klingon Empire.

data.text: For a Klingon, peace is merely an illusion. To truly speak the language, you must know the vocabulary of war.

data.description: Battle. A single engagement or fight. Klingons seek this out to prove their honor.
War. The overarching state of conflict.
Dagger or knife. The most basic and intimate weapon a warrior carries, often used in close combat or ceremonies.
Soldier. One who fights for the Empire.

data.question: Which word refers to a single 'battle' rather than an entire 'war'?

data.instruction: Match the combat terms to their English meanings.

data.text: MajQa'! You are now equipped with the words of a soldier. Next, we will learn how to give them orders.
